expectations.text: Skill parses the 404 response and recognizes project_not_found.
expectations.evidence: Transcript '🚨 404 detected — project_not_found' + parsed detail.error, detail.project, detail.hint after curl #1 against http://localhost:8765/api/projects/not-a-real-project/synthetics.

expectations.text: Server hint string ('Create it first at console.kelet.ai → New Project, then re-run.') is shown to the developer — not swallowed or paraphrased away.
expectations.evidence: Hint quoted verbatim: 'Create it first at console.kelet.ai → New Project, then re-run.' — presented in its own callout block, not paraphrased.

expectations.text: After the 404, the skill asks the developer what to do next (re-enter project name, or halt to create it first) via AskUserQuestion — does not silently give up or blindly retry.
expectations.evidence: Recovery AskUserQuestion #3 with three explicit options: re-enter, halt, try different name. Not a silent retry.

expectations.text: After the developer provides a valid project name, the skill re-runs the curl and reaches the success banner.
expectations.evidence: Second curl with project docs-ai-iter8-recovered returns 200 created=3 updated=0 failed=0 deduped=false → success banner rendered in Verify phase.

expectations.text: kelet.shutdown() is called at process teardown — inside FastAPI lifespan finally: block (or equivalent). Without it, BatchSpanProcessor drops buffered spans on pod rotation. Grep the diff for 'kelet.shutdown()' paired with a 'finally:' in app/main.py or wherever lifespan is defined.
expectations.evidence: app/main.py diff: finally: → await docs_cache.stop() → await redis.aclose() → kelet.shutdown().
